title: Diffusion Models explained..
summary: A video explanation of diffusion models covering the progression, strengths, weaknesses, and mechanics of how diffusion works as both a process and framework. The video discusses diffusion model implementations including transformers and DiT architecture, exploring multiple angles of the concept.
